subject: Implementation: Event parsers (internal/cli/events.go)
description:
Implement event type system and parsers based on Task 5 design.

Dependencies: Task 5 complete (event type system designed)

Files: internal/cli/events.go

Implementation:
1. Add event type structs (AskUserQuestionEvent, PlanApprovalEvent, etc.)
2. Implement As* methods for each type (AsAskUserQuestion(), AsPlanApproval())
3. Add validation logic
4. Add helper functions (IsInteractive(), RequiresResponse())

Deliverable:
- Production-ready event type system
- Parser functions with error handling
- Unit tests for parsers

Acceptance:
- [ ] All event types implemented
- [ ] Parser functions work with captured JSONs
- [ ] Validation catches malformed events
- [ ] Unit tests >80% coverage
- [ ] Follows go.md conventions (explicit errors, no naked returns)
